# llms.txt

# TitanCloud Architecture
A distributed cloud storage system designed for high availability.

## System Modules
- Networking Layer: [arch/networking.md](./arch/networking.md)
- Storage Engine: [arch/storage.md](./arch/storage.md)
- Auth Service: [arch/auth.md](./arch/auth.md)

## High-Level Flow
Request $\rightarrow$ Auth Service $\rightarrow$ Networking Layer $\rightarrow$ Storage Engine
